QQQ.name: Invesco QQQ Trust
QQQ.description: Tracks 100 largest non-financial companies on NASDAQ

EEM.name: iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF
EEM.description: Tracks emerging market equities across developing countries

VTI.name: Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF
VTI.description: Tracks entire US stock market including large, mid, and small-cap

AGG.name: iShares Core US Aggregate Bond ETF
AGG.description: Tracks US bonds including Treasuries, mortgage-backed, corporate

XLK.name: Technology Select Sector SPDR
XLK.description: Tracks technology companies in the S&P 500

EQAC.name: Equinix European Tech ETF
EQAC.description: Tracks technology and digital companies listed on European exchanges

EXSA.name: iShares STOXX Europe 600 ETF
EXSA.description: Tracks 600 large, mid and small-cap European companies across 17 countries

EQQQ.name: Invesco EQQQ Nasdaq 100 UCITS ETF
EQQQ.description: The Invesco EQQQ Nasdaq 100 UCITS ETF aims to track the performance of the Nasdaq 100 Index, providing exposure to 100 of the largest non-financial companies listed on the Nasdaq Stock Market. It offers European investors access to a portfolio heavily weighted towards US large-cap growth companies, primarily in the technology and innovative sectors.
EQQQ.asset_class: US Large-Cap Growth Equities, Technology & Innovation Sector

IWQU.name: iShares MSCI World Quality Factor UCITS ETF
IWQU.index: MSCI World Sector Neutral Quality Index
IWQU.description: Seeks to track the performance of an index composed of developed market companies selected based on quality factor characteristics, such as high return on equity, stable earnings growth, and low financial leverage. Aims to provide exposure to companies with strong and sustainable business models.
IWQU.asset_class: Global Developed Market Quality Factor Equities

INRE.name: Invesco Real Estate Select Income Fund
INRE.index: Actively managed, does not track a specific index.
INRE.description: An actively managed ETF seeking income and long-term capital appreciation by investing primarily in equity securities of U.S. real estate companies, including Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs).

VWCE.name: Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF Accumulating
VWCE.description: Invests in a geographically diversified portfolio of global large, mid, and small-cap equities across developed and emerging markets, with dividends automatically reinvested. Aims to track the performance of the FTSE All-World Index.
